title: Issue Reporting & Validation

use_cases.name: Report Recurring Failure
preconditions: cooldown period (default 24h) has elapsed or error key not yet seen
steps: getConfig() — read env vars for repo, cooldown, minStreak
shouldReport(signals, config) — validate trigger conditions + cooldown dedup via readState()
computeErrorKey(signals) — SHA-256 hash of relevant signal subset
extractErrorSignature(signals) — human-readable error description
buildIssueBody(opts) — compose markdown body with env fingerprint, failure signals, recent events table, session log excerpt (all sanitized via redactString)
findExistingIssue(repo, title, token) — GET GitHub Search API to detect duplicate open issues
createGithubIssue(repo, title, body, token) — POST to GitHub Issues API (15s timeout)
writeState(state) — persist lastReportedAt, recentIssueKeys, issue URL/number
outcomes: New GitHub issue created (#N) in target repo
Duplicate detected — state updated, issue skipped
API failure — non-fatal logged, no state written

use_cases.name: Build Validation Report
use_cases.trigger: buildValidationReport({ geneId, commands, results, envFp, startedAt, finishedAt })
steps: captureEnvFingerprint() — gather node version, platform, arch, container flag, evolver version
Map commands + results into normalized { command, ok, stdout, stderr } entries (truncated at 4000 chars each)
Compute overall_ok (all results pass)
computeAssetId(report) — content hash for dedup/integrity
Return ValidationReport object with schema_version, id, gene_id, env_fingerprint, commands[], overall_ok, duration_ms, created_at, asset_id

use_cases.name: Validate Report Integrity
steps: Check obj.type === 'ValidationReport'
Check obj.id is a non-empty string
Check obj.commands is an Array
Check obj.overall_ok is boolean
outcomes: Returns true — report is well-formed and consumable

use_cases.name: Analyze Past Failures (Self-Correction)
steps: Locate MEMORY.md in cwd
Parse failure rows via regex: /F\d+/ Fix entries with summary + detail
Return top 3 failures for prompt injection context
outcomes: { status: 'success', count: N, failures: [...] } — up to 3 structured failure entries

include_extends: UC1 <<include>> UC2 (issue body uses env fingerprint, same source as ValidationReport)
UC1 <<include>> UC4 (failure analysis informs signal detection upstream)
UC2 <<include>> UC3 (consumers validate report before processing)
UC1 <<extend>> 'Find Existing Issue' (dedup check extends the base report flow)
data_objects: IssueReporterState: { lastReportedAt, recentIssueKeys[], lastIssueUrl, lastIssueNumber, lastSkippedAt }
ValidationReport: { type, schema_version, id, gene_id, env_fingerprint, env_fingerprint_key, commands[], overall_ok, duration_ms, created_at, asset_id }
FailureAnalysis: { status, count, failures[{ summary, detail }] }
IssueBody: markdown string — env section, failure summary, error signature, recent events table, session log excerpt
important_notes: issueReporter uses SHA-256 error keys for dedup, 24h cooldown, and sanitizes all user-facing content before posting. ValidationReport is schema-versioned and content-hashed (asset_id) for interoperability with external Hubs/Judges. analyzer.js is a standalone meta-learning module, runnable directly (require.main check), reads MEMORY.md to surface top-3 prior failures for prompt context.
